name: Umm Hani bint Ali
title: Hashemite Lady
shortDescription: Daughter of Amir al-Mu'minin (AS) who came to Karbala with the Master of Martyrs' caravan and endured the hardships of captivity.
fullStory:
Umm Hani bint Ali ibn Abi Talib is one of the honored daughters of Amir al-Mu'minin (AS) whose presence in the Karbala caravan is mentioned in some historical sources.

Raised in a family full of light and infallibility, with the beginning of her brother Imam Hussain's (AS) uprising, she left Medina to accompany the Master of Martyrs on the path of truth.

On Ashura, Umm Hani witnessed the oppressed martyrdom of her brothers and nephews, and with a painful heart, she carried the heavy burden of captivity.

Along with Lady Zaynab (AS) and other Hashemite women, she traversed the difficult path of Kufa and Sham, delivering the message of Ashura to history through her sermons and mourning.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكِ يا بِنْتَ أَمِيرِ المُؤْمِنِينَ...
quote: (Greeting to the daughters of Amir al-Mu'minin:) Peace be upon you, O daughter of Amir al-Mu'minin...
